zh.Hawkshead, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson於1485年出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1540年在英國藍卡爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.Hawkshead, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson于1485年出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1540年在英国藍卡爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hodgson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Hodge + -son.

variants.name: Hodge
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Hogge, a rhyming pet form of Roger . In The Canterbury Tales, Chaucer's cook, ‘highte Hogge of Ware’, is invoked ‘Now tell on, Roger …’. Since Middle English spellings of the personal name are often impossible to distinguish from the nickname Hog(ge) ‘hog’, some early examples may be variants of Hogg .

variants.name: Hodgin
meanings: shortened form of   Hodgson   with assimilation of /s/ to the preceding consonant.
perhaps from the rare Middle English personal name Hogin, a diminutive of Hodge , though this has not yet been found in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson was born in 1485, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1540, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson est né en 1485, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1540, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson wurde 1485 in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1540 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson è nato il nel 1485 nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1540, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Hawkshead, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアド
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgsonは1485年にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1540年にイギリスランカシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson(은)는 1485년 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1540년 영국 랭카실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson nasceu em 1485, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1540, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson родился в 1485 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1540 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Hodgson nació en 1485, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1540, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
